response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior generalist with broad full-stack and some systems experience, but the role has hard requirements that are not met: native-level Japanese proficiency is absent (only English, Romanian, basic German listed), and there is no demonstrated experience with embedded LAN-switch firmware, MACsec/802.1X/Captive Portal, Linux kernel source modification, or chip-vendor SDKs. C experience exists but is dated (2014-2015 at National Instruments) and not in an embedded networking security context.
strengths: Long track record as a senior engineer with strong software craftsmanship, TDD, and CI/CD discipline
Past C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a C IDE product
Comfortable across languages and stacks, with some low-level/systems exposure via DLang and Linux tooling
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency — a hard requirement
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or network security module ownership (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal)
No evidence of Linux kernel investigation/modification or chip-vendor SDK experience

key_factors.factor: Lacks embedded networking security domain experience
